response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The audio phonetically matches the songs but contains Miko-specific slurs/pronunciations ('続くだく' instead of '続くぜいたく') which were accurately captured by the burnt-in on-screen video lyrics. 2. JSON Usage: The scraper-provided lyrics contained multiple errors (e.g., 'たそがれがねてく', '手ごろうよ') and were corrected using the video's on-screen hardcoded lyrics as the primary fallback. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are timed to start and end exactly with Sakura Miko's vocals, with instrumental sections left silent to avoid ghost subtitles. Rapid-fire segments in 'Suki! Yuki! Honki Magic' and the outro rap are tightly aligned to prevent cascading delays.

subtitles.original: 華やぎ始めた 街は急ぎ足
subtitles.english: The city starting to get lively is in a hurry

subtitles.original: 贈り物決まる頃 たそがれてく
subtitles.english: By the time the presents are decided, twilight falls

subtitles.original: かじかんだ指をママが温めるね
subtitles.english: Mama warms my frostbitten fingers

subtitles.original: Happy holidays,happy holidays What a glorious time of year!
subtitles.english: Happy holidays, happy holidays What a glorious time of year!

subtitles.original: 大切なものはみんなそばにある
subtitles.english: The important things are all by my side

subtitles.original: 穏やかな毎日が続くだく
subtitles.english: I want these peaceful days to continue

subtitles.original: クリスマスがもうじきやって来る
subtitles.english: Christmas is coming soon

subtitles.original: うれしさをかくせない犬や猫まで
subtitles.english: Even dogs and cats can't hide their joy

subtitles.original: もみの木に灯る明かりをうけて
subtitles.english: Receiving the lights that glow on the fir tree

subtitles.original: いつもよりやさしそうなパパの目が
subtitles.english: Papa's eyes, looking gentler than usual,

subtitles.original: 笑ってる
subtitles.english: are laughing

subtitles.original: クリスマスは誰にもやって来る
subtitles.english: Christmas comes to everyone

subtitles.original: もしひとりぼっちでも寂しがらずに
subtitles.english: Even if you're all alone, don't be lonely

subtitles.original: 心に住むサンタに呼びかけて
subtitles.english: Call out to the Santa living in your heart

subtitles.original: 幼い頃の夢を
subtitles.english: The dreams of your childhood...

subtitles.original: 思い出してごらんよ
subtitles.english: ...try remembering them

subtitles.original: クリスマスが今年もやって来る
subtitles.english: Christmas is coming again this year

subtitles.original: 悲しかった出来事を消し去るように
subtitles.english: As if to erase the sad things

subtitles.original: さあパジャマを脱いだら出かけよう
subtitles.english: Come on, take off your pajamas and let's go out

subtitles.original: 少しずつ白くなる街路樹を
subtitles.english: Through the roadside trees that are gradually turning white,

subtitles.original: 駆け抜けて
subtitles.english: let's run through

subtitles.original: Happy happy holidays

subtitles.original: Ah Whipしたケーキのような街は 好き!雪!本気マジック
subtitles.english: Ah, the street looks like a whipped cake, Like! Snow! Really Magic

subtitles.original: 空がくれるコンフェッティは 冬のフェスタ祝う天使の羽よ Woo
subtitles.english: The confetti from the sky is the angel's feathers celebrating the winter festival, Woo

subtitles.original: 白銀の国へ出かけるの Go Go Go
subtitles.english: Heading off to the land of silver, Go Go Go

subtitles.original: 雪の汽車が街を駆け Choo Choo Choo
subtitles.english: Snowy train racing through the city, Choo Choo Choo

subtitles.original: 絵本みたいな景色を 君に見せてあげるから
subtitles.english: I'll show you a landscape like a picture book

subtitles.original: 願い込めて呪文をさあ(さあ) 唱えて(さんはい)
subtitles.english: So make a wish and chant the spell (One, two, three!)

subtitles.original: Light Upしたオーロラ色の街は 好き!雪!本気 Magic

subtitles.original: 子供でいられたら Dream Land

subtitles.english: I like this cold season, Love Love Love

subtitles.original: アイスも魔法もとけないようにヒューヒューヒュー

subtitles.original: ずっとこのままじゃダメなの? やっぱりドキドキしたいな

subtitles.original: 未来求め呪文今(今) 唱えて(さんはい)

subtitles.english: Ah, I feel like a hopping rabbit, Like! Snow! Really Magic

subtitles.original: 大地がくれる元気得たら 思い通り明日を生きていけるよ
subtitles.english: Once you get the energy from the earth, you can live tomorrow just as you wish

subtitles.original: まぶしい白に染まるハート 君に
subtitles.english: To you, whose heart is dyed in bright white,

subtitles.original: 好き!雪!本気 Magic
subtitles.english: Like! Snow! Really Magic

subtitles.original: 大人のふりなんていいじゃん
subtitles.english: It's okay to pretend to be an adult!
